textByHashes.3d18d8e744dbda35a0eaba4f3835b6862b447c47: Of course! We elves learned the art long ago, allowing us to form crystals in any way we would like, using just our voices.
textByHashes.b6174f201006cd4b6bede62c76d013fef2b33122: It's allowed us to make weapons, armour and tools using the finest crystals.
textByHashes.fde1cf45d538e3d427bb27792215f07f86fa9fe1: You might be able to with the help of the crystal bowl over there. As long as you've got the right knowledge of what you're trying to craft.
textByHashes.09a5e699a2ca222f8b8bab9458e651b1b4670e3c: You do not have all of the required materials and requirements to make anything.
textByHashes.a5dfef027a9a55d547d585be82e0af087e764caa: Of course! Would you like me to craft something for you? For some crystal shards, of course.
